wiki.summary: "Tear You Apart" is the second single released by the California-based darkwave duo, She Wants Revenge. This track was later re-released in their self-titled album of 2006. A section of the track was used in the psycho-suspence film, The Number 23. Moreover, it appeared in one of the 'Fringe' episodes called 'Midnight', and the season premiere of American Horror Story: Hotel. Read more on Last.fm.
